title: Gigantification
description: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.
smart_description: The next {Amount:plural:Attack you play deals|[blue]{}[/blue] Attacks you play deal} triple damage.
notes: This Counter-type power applies a 3x damage multiplier to the next powered Attack card played by the owner. After the attack resolves, the power decrements by 1. Can stack to affect multiple consecutive attacks in sequence.
